phase_name: Confirm which file is the stray (read-only corroboration gate)

objectives.description: Primary corroboration: read-only IMAP FETCH 34 against [Gmail]/All Mail
Match fetched Message-ID to exactly one file -> identify LEGIT vs STRAY
Secondary/fallback corroboration via notmuch + content comparison
Record identified stray filename; STOP if inconclusive

notes: CRITICAL: primary IMAP corroboration (far-UID 34, UIDVALIDITY cross-checked as unchanged) identifies eNTERTAINMENT cENTER (1770746110.1372450_624.hamsa,U=15:2,) as LEGIT and CEO Nick Slape (1770674724.1073681_15.hamsa,U=15:2,) as the STRAY.
